title: BENZYLisoTHIURONIUM CHLORlDE AS A REAGENT FOR DITHIOCARBAMIC ACIDS, XANTHIC ACIDS, ALKYL THIOSULPHURIC ACIDS AND SULPHINIC ACIDS
author: C. N. V. NAMBURY
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The use of benzyl \(iso\) thiuronium chloride as a reagent has been, extended for the identification of dithiocarbamic acids, xanthic acids, alkyl thiosulphuric acids and certain sulphinic acids. The melting points and analytical data pertaining to the derivatives are presented.
steps_raw: The use of benzyl \(iso\) thiuronium chloride as a reagent has been, extended for the identification of dithiocarbamic acids, xanthic acids, alkyl thiosulphuric acids and certain sulphinic acids. The melting points and analytical data pertaining to the derivatives are presented.
